description: Configurable lead scoring rules. Higher score = higher sales opportunity.

rules.reason: No website detected — major digital presence gap
No SSL certificate — security risk & SEO penalty
Low Google rating (< 4.0) — reputation management opportunity
No booking/appointment system detected — missing key conversion tool
Low review count (< 20) — needs reputation building strategy
No social media presence — missing brand awareness channel
No contact form detected — reducing online lead capture
